ab: na vaik aken ka tji kama a ljemizau tjai kama i paljan.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: na mapasae’tju a kula ni kama i paljan.
pasemalau tji kama i paljan tja nuamen aza uma’ nji madju na mabuan a za alju.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: ka ljemungua’ tji madju makelu a kema si alju.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: tji kama na kemacu tu a vutjul na ljuan kata saviki aru sipantez tjai kama i paljan.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: na imilad aken katji kama i paljan i ta tataedan ni madju sa pasemalamalau tja nu ken ta canalivatan ni madju.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: ka ru vaik anganken zemenger tji kama i paljan tja nuaken na mea’canga sa saua’lai yanga sun aya.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: nu sarungua’ angang su kula kivalau a matja nuamen ayaken na kipusau tji kama i paljan.
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, “When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us.”
